历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 188, plummeted to 956 in 2024 due to a gap (anomaly), and quickly rebounded to about 179 in 2025. Overall, there has been significant fluctuation in the past three years, but 2025 has returned to normal levels; the baseline for 2025 is about 179. The science enrollment plan in this province was 19 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 11 in 2025, showing a decreasing trend year by year.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 17th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with a stable upward trend in recent years (from 18th in 2021 to 17th in 2026), belonging to the top universities in China. The reputation evaluation in 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving teacher ethics incidents (e.g., professor sexual harassment leading to dismissal), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking is 44th (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-high level. It has 15 A+ or above disciplines including Law A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Sociology A+, Statistics A+, Marxist Theory A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Journalism and Communication A+, and Chinese Language and Literature A+, making it a top-tier university in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of majors like Law, Finance/Economics is polarized and wait-and-see, while Computer-related majors remain relatively hot. The total number of candidates in this province for 2026 is about 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), leading to intensified competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, which is an inter-provincial application for Xinjiang candidates, so regional preference factors exist. The university enrolls a small number of science students in Xinjiang (only 11 in 2025), with a small enrollment scale and high sensitivity to ranking fluctuations. The predicted minimum ranking is about 199, with a range of 176–222.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Artificial Intelligence (Top Class)
- Statistics (Economic Statistics, Applied Statistics, Statistics, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Finance (Finance, Financial Engineering, Insurance, Credit Management)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (Economics, National Economic Management, Energy Economics, International Economics and Trade, Digital Economy)
- Law
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Information Management and Information Systems)
- Mathematics (Elite Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Business Administration (Business Administration, Financial Management, Accounting, Marketing, Management Science) (Business Data Analysis Direction, Trade Economics)
- Human Resource Management (Economics and Management Pilot Class)
- Social Science Pilot Class (Management Discipline Category)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 176–222, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 176), you can focus on impacting Tier 1 majors such as Artificial Intelligence Top Class and Statistics. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., around 222), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 90th, in 2024 approximately 89th, and in 2025 approximately 105th. Over the past three years, it has remained stable in the 90–105 range, with a slight decline in 2025 compared to the previous two years. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 105th. The provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 21 students in 2023, 21 in 2024, and increased to 30 in 2025, showing an expansion trend.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranks approximately 17th on the Soft Science Main Ranking (2026), with a stable or rising trend in recent years, making it a top national university. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to teacher ethics incidents (e.g., professor sexual harassment leading to dismissal), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology. Its Douyin popularity ranks 44th (relatively hot), with overall attention at a medium-to-high level. It has 15 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Law, Theoretical Economics, Sociology, Statistics, Marxist Theory, Business Administration, Applied Economics, Journalism and Communication, and Chinese Language and Literature, making it a national leader in humanities and social sciences.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for majors like Law and Journalism/Communication is polarized or clearly discouraged, while Finance/Finance and Economics/Economics is polarized and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), leading to intensified competition. Renmin University of China is located in Beijing, making it an inter-provincial application for Xinjiang candidates. The university's liberal arts enrollment in the province increased to 30 in 2025, a relatively large scale, which provides some buffer for rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of approximately 105th in 2025, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 (intensified competition), the expansion to 30 students in 2025, and the somewhat negative university reputation, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to decline slightly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 120th, with a range of 106–134.
